title: [cross-impl] outdated current_channel refs in vectors after rx_channel rename
description: ccp9-rendezvous.json and related test vectors/docs still reference scheduler current_channel / last_announce.current_channel. Python/Rust/Zephyr structs and code now consistently use rx_channel (CCP-9). Update oracle descriptions and any sim code for consistency. Same algorithm (rendezvous scheduling) risks different behavior if field names drift further.
